query: INSERT INTO ransomware_events (reGroupName, victimName, victimUrl, reCountry, reSector, reDescription, publishedAt, reSource, verified) VALUES ('FULCRUMSEC', 'LexisNexis (RELX Group)', 'https://www.lexisnexis.com', 'United States', 'Legal & Professional Services', 'FULCRUMSEC claimed breach of LexisNexis, exfiltrating 2.04GB of structured data including 536 Redshift tables, 430+ VPC database tables, 53 AWS Secrets Manager secrets in plaintext, 3.9M Enterprise Data Warehouse records, ~400K cloud user profiles, 118 government user accounts (federal judges, DOJ attorneys, SEC staff), 21K customer account records, and 45 employee password hashes. Attack vector: React2Shell vulnerability → container role → AWS lateral movement. Source: https://dailydarkweb.net/lexisnexis-investigates-massive-data-breach-by-fulcrumsec/', '2026-03-03 00:00:00', 'dailydarkweb.net', false), ('FULCRUMSEC', 'Avnet', 'https://www.avnet.com', 'United States', 'Electronics', 'FULCRUMSEC claimed 850GB data exfiltration from Avnet, a major electronics distributor. First known victim. Source: WatchGuard Ransomware Tracker.', '2025-09-26 00:00:00', 'watchguard', false), ('FULCRUMSEC', 'youX', NULL, 'Australia', 'FinTech', 'FULCRUMSEC claimed 300GB data exfiltration from youX, an Australian FinTech company. Source: WatchGuard Ransomware Tracker.', '2025-10-15 00:00:00', 'watchguard', false), ('FULCRUMSEC', 'Raptor Supplies', 'https://www.raptorsupplies.com', 'United Kingdom', 'Military/Industrial', 'FULCRUMSEC claimed breach of Raptor Supplies, a UK military/industrial supplier. Source: WatchGuard Ransomware Tracker.', '2025-11-01 00:00:00', 'watchguard', false);
